title: AOFITEE XL Dog Jumper, Turtleneck Dog Jumpers Large Size Dogs, Large Dogs Sweater for Female Male, Thick Warm Labrador Christmas Jumper Knitted Sweater Winter Fall Pet Sweatshirt (Pink XLarge)
features: Warm & High Elasticity Dog Jumper: AOFITEE Dog Jumper are made of high density and stretchable acrylic yarn that is comfortable, soft, comfy. The toasty-warm small dog jumper has everything for your pet's needs, Warm for dogs wearing

6 Sizes for All Breeds of Dogs: The dog winter Jumper are available in 6 sizes from XS to XXL, suit for yorkshire, boxer, french bulldog, poodle, pomeranian, shih tzu, chihuahua, dachshund, pug, frenchie, golden retriever, great dane, etc

Convenient to Wear, Pee & Poop: This lightweight jumpers for dogs with pullover design, it slips easily over your pet's head. The high opening at the abdomen so dog can comfortably wear it when they need to potty without staining the pet clothes

Timeless Turtleneck Jumper with Sleeves: Our small dog jumper with turtleneck and two-legs design, not only provide a fashion look, but also can be fully wrapped to keep dog warm. Soft touch feeling makes your baby comfortable in cold weather

Versatile for Multi Occasion: The dog jumper for small dogs is perfect for every fall and winter adventure! It adds a festive touch to your dog's apparel, whether it's a birthday celebration, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Christmas party, Valentine's Day
description: Product Description AOFITEE Dog Jumper, Warm Solid Color Dog Jumpers for Small Medium Large Dogs Turtleneck Dog Jumper with Legs AOFITEE Winter Warm Dog Jumper for Small Medium Large Dogs * Soft & Stretch Doggie Jumpers: The knitted sweater is suitable for most dog breeds. Soft knitted fabric wraps around your furry friend, ensuring maximum comfort. * Warm Dog Christmas Jumper: Turtleneck dogs sweater with two sleeves providing extra warmth in cold weather. * Christmas Dog Sweater: The classic knitted jumper is perfect for various parties, whether it's as a dog holiday sweater, halloween jumper for dogs, Valentine's Day dog knitwear, or daily dog sweater, it's a great choice.
